name: airline-pricing
topic: airline pricing on a route with one competitor

rubrics: Facts should cover the duopoly pricing dynamic rather than a broad airline-industry survey.
Facts should identify the relevant cost structure and demand characteristics that shape pricing moves.
Facts should keep competitor positioning explicit without turning the fixture into a generic market summary.
Every player entity should be a genuine actor with independent agency in the situation.
Each player should have at least one objective that is specific to their position in this scenario.
Do not invent players not implied by the prompt — if the prompt describes two parties, there should be two players unless a third party is clearly relevant.
